---
title: "Linear model refresher"
params: 
    SHOW_SOLS: FALSE
    TOGGLE: TRUE
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

<!-- render in RStudio/not production profile:   SHOW_SOLS: TRUE -->
<!-- render in terminal/with production profile: SHOW_SOLS: FALSE -->

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source('assets/setup.R')
library(xaringanExtra)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(ggdist)
xaringanExtra::use_panelset()
qcounter <- function(){
  if(!exists("qcounter_i")){
    qcounter_i <<- 1
  }else{
    qcounter_i <<- qcounter_i + 1
  }
  qcounter_i
}
```

`r qbegin(qcounter())`

lorem ipsum

`r qend()`
`r solbegin(show=params$SHOW_SOLS, toggle=params$TOGGLE)`

dolor sit amet

`r solend()`
